blended.narrative: Timberline is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,521 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 47".
